purpose: Map changed source/artifact paths, including non-ignored untracked files, to focused RCH validation lanes without running cargo. This is a planning contract for pending slices when RCH worker selection is blocked: it emits the exact static checks and remote-only cargo commands agents should run once RCH is admissible.

remote_cargo_commands: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo check -p frankenlibc-abi --features=standalone
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo check -p frankenlibc-abi --features=standalone,owned-tls-cache
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-abi --features=standalone,owned-tls-cache -- -D warnings
path_rules.notes: Resolver ABI changes need standalone and owned-tls-cache feature proof, but no local cargo proof may be counted while RCH is blocked.

remote_preflight_commands: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 bash scripts/check_rch_remote_admissibility.sh "cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test standalone_tls_removal_experiment_test -- --nocapture"
remote_cargo_commands: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test standalone_tls_removal_experiment_test -- --nocapture
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo check -p frankenlibc-harness --test standalone_tls_removal_experiment_test
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-harness --test standalone_tls_removal_experiment_test -- -D warnings
path_rules.notes: Harness test changes use focused test/check/clippy lanes for the single integration test binary.

remote_preflight_commands: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 bash scripts/check_rch_remote_admissibility.sh "cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test standalone_tls_removal_experiment_test -- --nocapture"
remote_cargo_commands: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test standalone_tls_removal_experiment_test -- --nocapture
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo check -p frankenlibc-harness --test standalone_tls_removal_experiment_test
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-harness --test standalone_tls_removal_experiment_test -- -D warnings
path_rules.notes: Manifest changes need JSON plus standalone/TLS rollup checkers and the focused harness test lane once RCH is admissible.

remote_cargo_commands: RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo test -p frankenlibc-harness --test {test_name} -- --nocapture
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo check -p frankenlibc-harness --test {test_name}
RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo clippy -p frankenlibc-harness --test {test_name} -- -D warnings
path_rules.notes: CLI contract harness tests may appear as new untracked files before commit; plan focused remote proof from the path stem and never count local cargo.
The diff-matrix checker and manifest are no-cargo tooling; validate with shell/JSON/self-check gates and do not invent a local cargo proof.

negative_controls.mutation: append an untracked-style harness test path that has no validation rule
replace one remote command with cargo check -p frankenlibc-abi
append RCH_REQUIRE_REMOTE=1 rch exec -- cargo check --workspace

validation.cargo_reason: This is a shell/Python planner and contract checker. It emits cargo commands for future remote execution but does not run cargo.
